prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次约1136→2375→2387→4119→4441，连续5年持续后移，累计后移约3305名；2025年基准约4441名，后移趋势明显；2021-2025年理科/物理类计划数分别为12、14、14、16、7人；2026年计划15人，较2025年7人扩招约114%，大幅扩招将显著影响竞争格局。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第19名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面事件；抖音热度排名第37（较热），短视频平台关注度中等偏上；历史投档异常记录为2022年江西位次下降，陕西未见明显断档；教育学A+、心理学A+、数学A、物理学A-、地理学A+、环境科学与工程A、统计学A等18个A-及以上学科，理科相关学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业社会热度高热推荐；本省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增长约19.7%，竞争加剧；北京师范大学位于北京，非本省高校；陕西考生赴京报考意愿受地域偏好影响有限，但北师大全国性声誉可部分抵消地域因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招约114%（扩招使位次数字增大）、本省考生增长约19.7%部分抵消扩招效应、学校顶尖层次与优势学科持续吸引考生等因素，预计2026年理科/物理类最低位次在2025年基准4441名基础上因扩招而大幅后移，但考生增加使后移幅度有所收窄；预测最低位次约7536名，区间7036–8036名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班（励耘实验班）（数学与应用数学、物理学、化学、生物科学）
- 计算机科学与技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 地理科学类/地理科学（励耘实验班）
- 物理学类（物理学、天文学）
- 化学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 生物科学类（生物科学、生物技术、生态学）
- 环境科学与工程类（环境科学、环境生态工程）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7036-8036名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向、一档王牌专业（励耘实验班、计算机）作为冲刺、三档专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（7036名以内）可重点冲击一档；位次接近区间上限（8036名附近）应以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category dropped from approximately 1136 to 2375 to 2387 to 4119 to 4441, continuously declining for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative decline of about 3305 places; the 2025 baseline is approximately 4441, with a clear downward trend; the planned enrollment numbers for Science/Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 12, 14, 14, 16, and 7 respectively; the 2026 plan is 15, an increase of about 114% compared to 2025's 7, and this significant expansion will notably affect the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 19th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively popular), with above-average attention on short video platforms; historical admission anomalies include a ranking drop in Jiangxi in 2022, with no obvious gaps in Shaanxi; it has 18 A- or above disciplines including Education A+, Psychology A+, Mathematics A, Physics A-, Geography A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Statistics A, etc., with strong science-related disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other popular science majors are highly recommended; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in this province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, not a provincial university; the willingness of Shaanxi examinees to apply to Beijing is limited by regional preferences, but BNU's national reputation can partially offset regional factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, the significant enrollment expansion of about 114% in 2026 (expansion increases the ranking number), the increase of about 19.7% in provincial examinees partially offsetting the expansion effect, and the university's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines continuing to attract examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category in 2026 will drop significantly from the 2025 baseline of 4441 due to expansion, but the increase in examinees will narrow the decline; the predicted minimum ranking is about 7536, with a range of 7036–8036.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Science Experimental Class (Li Yun Experimental Class) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biological Sciences)
- Computer Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Geographical Science Class/Geographical Science (Li Yun Experimental Class)
- Physics Class (Physics, Astronomy)
- Chemistry.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Education Class (Education, Educational Technology, Preschool Education, Special Education)
- Biological Science Class (Biological Science, Biotechnology, Ecology)
- Environmental Science and Engineering Class (Environmental Science, Environmental Ecological Engineering)
- Sociology ("Sociology + Psychology" Dual Bachelor's Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7036-8036, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 flagship majors (Li Yun Experimental Class, Computer Science) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 7036), you can focus on Tier 1; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 8036), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 as a backup.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 160 → 184 → 163 → 250 → 201. In 2024, there was a noticeable backward shift (rank 250), and in 2025 it fell back to about rank 201. Over the past five years, the overall fluctuation ranged between 160 and 250, with a baseline of about rank 201 in 2025. The planned enrollment numbers for liberal arts/history category from 2021 to 2025 were 8, 8, 6, 8, and 7 respectively. In 2026, the plan is 7 students, unchanged from 2025, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 19th, firmly ranking as the top normal university in China. Its 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively popular), with above-average attention on short video platforms. Historical admission anomaly records include a ranking drop in Jiangxi in 2022, but no significant gaps in Shaanxi. It has 18 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Geography, and Marxist Theory, demonstrating top-tier academic strength and strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of normal/education majors is mixed with a wait-and-see attitude; law is relatively popular, and Chinese language and literature is recommended. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in this province is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17% from 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, not a local university in this province, so there is no local admission preference. The willingness of Shaanxi candidates to apply to Beijing is limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations (baseline of about rank 201 in 2025), unchanged enrollment plans, intensified competition due to an approximately 17% increase in local candidates, and the continuous attraction of top-tier university level and advantageous disciplines to high-scoring candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 211, with a range of 186–236.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 186), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 236), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors as a backup.
